.. raw:: latex

   \HBApplyLang{en}

.. only:: latex

   .. raw:: latex

      \section{OPERATION GUIDE}

   BUTTONS & KEY COMBINATIONS
   --------------------------

   Press the DISPLAY button to wake the screen. Hold it for two seconds to turn the unit off.

   .. list-table::
      :header-rows: 1
      :widths: 30 35 35

      * - Button
        - Short Press
        - Long Press
      * - DISPLAY
        - Wake the LCD screen
        - Power off the unit
      * - AC
        - Toggle AC output
        - Enable quiet charging

   .. raw:: latex

      \HBNoteBlock{NOTE}{The AC output turns off automatically after 12 hours without load. Rated power\* values are measured at 25°C.}

   SCREEN MODES
   ------------

   .. raw:: latex

      \begin{HBLcdModeTable}{lcd_overview.png}
      \HBLcdModeFirstGroup{Power Saving On}{Short press DISPLAY}{Wake the screen}{Hold DISPLAY 2s}{Power off}{Double press}{Cycle brightness}
      \HBLcdModeSecondGroup{Power Saving Off}{Short press DISPLAY}{Cycle info panes}{Hold DISPLAY 2s}{Power off}{Double press}{Lock buttons}
      \end{HBLcdModeTable}

   - Keep the vents uncovered while any output is active.
   - Charge the unit to 60% before storing it for more than one month.
